cases.prompt: 잠깐 쉬었다 올게, 지금까지 한 거 checkpoint 로 저장해줘

assertions.text: It captures the current git state including the active branch as part of the saved checkpoint.
It records decisions made so far and the work that still remains.
It persists the checkpoint to disk so it can be resumed later in another session.

cases.prompt: Where was I? I want to pick up where I left off on this branch.

assertions.text: It locates the most recent checkpoint or recent project artifacts for the current branch.
It summarizes the prior git state, decisions, and remaining work so the user can resume exactly where they stopped.
It gives a short welcome-back briefing referencing the last session before continuing.

cases.prompt: what was I working on before the workspace handoff to another branch?

assertions.text: It supports resuming working state even across Conductor workspace handoffs between branches.
It reports the branch context and what was in progress at the time the checkpoint was saved.
